title: Kanban Board · Luminous Putty
summary: A dark claymorphism Kanban board on a deep tinted-indigo canvas with clearly puffy raised pastel-clay cards and controls, paired inset highlight/shadow plus soft cast depth, and restrained low-radius glow as a secondary material cue. Light pastel faces on dark indigo putty masses — unmistakably clay, not dark-neon or cool-gray neumorphism.
